title: Omniscient Reader: The Prophecy
posterAlt: Omniscient Reader: The Prophecy (2025) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Kim Dok-ja, an ordinary man in his 20s, is the only reader of an obscure web novel titled "Three Ways to Survive the Apocalypse". After having read the last chapter, the novel suddenly becomes reality, and its omnipotent hero Yu Jung-hyeok appears before Kim. As the only person who knows how to survive in this world, Kim and his companions strive to save the world by writing his own, new ending.
synopsis: Omniscient Reader: The Prophecy (2025) is a action, adventure and fantasy film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.1 rating on TMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a +13 certification (AR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
